_doc: Typhon profiler config for the IOProfileRunner workload. Subsystem roots match the workload stages (see Program.cs RunWorkload):
_doc_stages: spawnBurst / spawnCheckpointLoop  → ECS.Spawn + Storage.PageCache + Data.Transactions + Durability.WAL+Checkpoint
_doc_skipped: Scheduler / Runtime — runner bypasses TyphonRuntime; no DAG telemetry to capture.
Query — workload doesn't run any EcsQuery (only Spawn / direct DBE ops).
Spatial — no R-tree / spatial-grid traffic in this workload.
Concurrency — high-volume lock telemetry would dwarf the actual workload signal.
